evals.prompt: Extract the avalara-tax app so I can make some changes to the hook implementations.
evals.expected_output: Extracts avalara-tax ZIP from tax/avalara-tax/, shows extracted path, reminds to delete before committing. Does NOT run full inspection since user wants to modify files.

evals.prompt: I need to see what's inside the avalara-tax app. Show me the directory layout and key config files.
evals.expected_output: Extracts avalara-tax ZIP, shows directory tree, reads commerce-app.json and key config files, runs issue checks, generates inspection report, cleans up extracted directory.

evals.prompt: I'm getting CI validation errors on loqate-address-verification. Can you inspect the ZIP and check for obvious issues like junk files or missing required files?
evals.expected_output: Extracts ZIP from address-verification/loqate-address-verification/, runs validation checks for junk files (.DS_Store, __MACOSX), verifies required files exist, checks for hardcoded secrets and absolute paths, reports findings, cleans up.

evals.prompt: I want to learn how the stripe-payment integration hooks and services work.
evals.expected_output: Extracts stripe-payment ZIP from payment/stripe-payment/, shows hooks.json, reads service configurations from impex/install/services.xml, displays hook implementation files, provides overview, cleans up.

evals.prompt: Extract tax/avalara-tax so I can look at the impex files and make some fixes.
evals.expected_output: Extracts avalara-tax ZIP to tax/avalara-tax/, shows extracted path. Stops after extraction since user wants to browse and edit files themselves. Reminds to use /package-app when done and delete before committing.
